name: sqldw-authoring-cli
description: > Execute authoring T-SQL (DDL, DML, data ingestion, transactions, schema changes) against Microsoft Fabric Data Warehouse and SQL endpoints from agentic CLI environments. Use when the user wants to: (1) create/alter/drop tables from terminal, (2) insert/update/delete/merge data via CLI, (3) run COPY INTO or OPENROWSET ingestion, (4) manage transactions or stored procedures, (5) perform schema evolution, (6) use time travel or snapshots, (7) generate ETL/ELT shell scripts, (8) create views/funct
author: microsoft
